title: overgeared + epic knights: slavic armory
description: compatibility between epic knights: slavic armory and overgeared
body:
adds overgeared smithing recipes for epic knights: slavic armory

adds overgeared smithing recipes for weapons and armor from slavic armory

I highly recomend using [overgeared + epic knights compat](https://modrinth.com/datapack/overgeared-+-epic-knights-compat) as well since this datapack doesn't add compatibility for the epic knights mod itself

JEI is recomended
